reason: Only baseline/carry-forward stock metrics are available in this repo; there is no historical financial announcement or acquisition-date table.
theme_map.csv has no effective_start/effective_end/source_date fields, so current classifications cannot be safely replayed as historical membership.
The historical cache used by the replay contains OHLCV only; turnover_value was computed as close * volume, not official TWSE/TPEx turnover amount.
